front_line: Connected public safety platform spanning the modern metropolis
thesis: Axon is transforming from hardware to a high-margin software platform that creates switching costs once departments integrate evidence management with court systems. The platform expansion into dispatch and AI analytics could justify the premium, but the business model shift needs to accelerate.
moat: Switching costs and regulatory lock-in real but narrow
risks: Trading at 2,000x free cash flow with no clear path to justify valuation

drafts.x_post: AXON trading at 2,000x FCF betting on police software transformation. Strong switching costs once integrated, but valuation requires near-perfect execution. August earnings will show if software growth justifies the premium. Dead Simple Score: 89 🎯
video_talking_points: Axon makes body cameras and tasers but the real bet is on becoming the software platform for police departments.
Government digitization is accelerating and once departments integrate with court systems, switching costs become prohibitive.
The platform expansion into AI analytics and dispatch could create massive pricing power as a monopoly-like position.
Trading at 2,000x free cash flow means any execution stumble or big tech competition could crush the stock.
It's a watchlist play until August earnings show software revenue growing fast enough to justify this valuation.

image.query: Digital fortress of connected sensors and intelligence protecting a modern city
